rationale: Observation payload has service_variant: 'sbs' and route_type: 'Select Bus Service', but its base_record_id route_s79-hylan-2010 is the local S79 (route_type: 'local'). The strong identity field service_variant differs, so this observation should not live under the local record. The canonical S79 SBS record is route_able-s79-sbs, which represents the same real-world SBS variant (later branded S79+). Source 201109_brt_hylan_proposed is a September 2011 Hylan Boulevard SBS proposal document; the 'S79 SBS' mentioned therein is the planned service that later became the operational S79+. Not blocked by any do_not_merge_pairs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: For S79 SBS and all local and express bus services
